top_signals.title: Oil price back at prewar levels as Gulf flows pick up
top_signals.summary: Brent crude drops below the $72.48 a barrel it traded at in late February before Iran conflict erupted
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Embraces the Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls
top_signals.summary: The dollar is wrapping up one of its best months in a year as a raft of Wall Street banks see a turnaround of fortunes for the US currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Hormuz Flows After Ship Attack
top_signals.summary: Oil held a gain as traders weighed the outlook for a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo ship was attacked in the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: An implausible but engaging crime drama unfolds in ‘Magical Secret Tour’
top_signals.summary: In Chihiro Amano's "Magical Secret Tour," a trio of Japanese women becomes embroiled in a scheme to smuggle gold from Singapore.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Asia Stocks Set for Choppy Open on Tech Volatility: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia were set for a mixed open Friday after a volatile Wall Street session, where renewed selling in megacap technology shares offset gains fueled by resilient US economic data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
